tool_args.label: SIM4X and SIM8X Discontinuation and Conversion

payload.title: Service Changes: SIM4X and SIM8X Discontinuation and Conversion to Some SIM4 and SIM8 Trips

tool_args.label: Sarah Wyss, Acting Chief, Operations Planning

payload.description: Weekday peak period, peak direction express bus route between Staten Island's South Shore along Richmond Avenue and Downtown Manhattan
Short variant of SIM4 serving only two stops on Staten Island (Staten Island Mall Park-and-Ride and one other stop) but all same SIM4 stops in Downtown Manhattan
Weekday peak period, peak direction express bus route between Staten Island's South Shore along Richmond Avenue and Midtown Manhattan
Short variant of SIM8 serving only two stops on Staten Island (Staten Island Mall Park-and-Ride and one other stop) but all same SIM8 stops in Midtown Manhattan

tool_args.label: SIM4X and SIM8X Discontinuation and Conversion

payload.project_name: SIM4X and SIM8X Discontinuation and Conversion to Some SIM4 and SIM8 Trips
payload.description: Discontinue the SIM4X and SIM8X variants of the SIM4 and SIM8, respectively, and reinvest into seven full-route SIM4 trips and two full-route SIM8 trips while meeting schedule loading guidelines
Proposed implementation date for SIM4X and SIM8X discontinuation and conversion to SIM4 and SIM8 trips

tool_args.label: Staten Island Express Bus Redesign August 2018

payload.description: Staten Island Express Bus Redesign established SIM4X and SIM8X variants to experiment with leveraging the Staten Island Mall Park-and-Ride to attract ridership
One more stop in Staten Island was added in each direction near their first/last stops in Staten Island for SIM4X and SIM8X

payload.claim_text: The SIM4X and SIM8X trips are underutilized, on average, the SIM4X trips are running approximately 15% full and the SIM8X trips are running approximately 25% full

warnings: claim.routes is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route arrays should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

payload.claim_text: Make better use of underutilized resources by discontinuing the SIM4X and SIM8X variants of the SIM4 and SIM8, respectively, and reinvest into seven full-route SIM4 trips and two full-route SIM8 trips while meeting schedule loading guidelines
Do nothing. Service adjustments to better utilize resources while meeting passenger ridership demand would not be made.

payload.description: Project discontinues SIM4X variant and reinvests into seven full-route SIM4 trips
Project discontinues SIM8X variant and reinvests into two full-route SIM8 trips

tool_args.label: Project has timeline event Fall 2025 implementation

payload.description: SIM4X and SIM8X were established as part of the 2018 Staten Island Express Bus Redesign

tool_args.label: Project has timeline event Jan 2019 stop added

payload.description: In January 2019, one more stop in Staten Island was added in each direction
Proposal to discontinue SIM4X and SIM8X presented to NYCT/MTA Bus Committee
